algorithm: RGB-to-gray; Gaussian 5x5; Scharr gradients; adaptive Gaussian threshold; connected components; Canny thinning
quality_or_failure_handling: ROI is user supplied; component and gradient filtering
menipy_relevance: Prototype a gradient-quality detector or QA channel

algorithm: Per-row left/right extrema followed by nonlinear needle fit
outputs: needle diameter axis rotation and residuals
quality_or_failure_handling: Rejects residuals >=1 px and excessive left/right imbalance
menipy_relevance: Adopt concepts for calibrated needle residual diagnostics

algorithm: Largest component; robust circle fit around bowl; inertia eigenvector symmetry; apex arc selection
outputs: ordered contour apex axis and direction
quality_or_failure_handling: Circle residual median and asymmetry checks
menipy_relevance: Prototype as initializer and independent contour QA

algorithm: Bashforth-Adams initial guess; analytic Jacobian; scipy least_squares LM
outputs: Bond number apex radius rotation volume area residuals
quality_or_failure_handling: Strict tolerances; 50 evaluations; exposes objective and residual vectors

algorithm: Pixel scale from calibration or needle diameter; gamma=delta_rho*g*R0^2/Bo
outputs: surface tension Worthington number volume and surface area
quality_or_failure_handling: Requires explicit density gravity and calibration
menipy_relevance: Improve unit provenance and calibration gates

algorithm: Baseline supplied by user/analysis input; no general automatic substrate detector
Selects near-baseline branches; line fit if residuals <1 px else circle; tangent at baseline intersections
quality_or_failure_handling: Returns independent side residuals and missing-side states

algorithm: Manual ROI; grayscale; Gaussian blur; inverse Otsu; largest external contour; every-tenth-point sampling
quality_or_failure_handling: Fails when no contour or all points lie below baseline
menipy_relevance: Reject direct adoption; retain as simple comparison baseline

algorithm: User right-drag line; calculations reduce it to mean y
quality_or_failure_handling: A visibly tilted line is not honored by the math
menipy_relevance: Add regression test ensuring Menipy preserves tilted baselines

algorithm: Linear least-squares circle or cv2 ellipse; implicit tangent at horizontal intersections
outputs: left right and average contact angles
quality_or_failure_handling: No residual threshold uncertainty or validity-domain rejection

algorithm: Loads frames and repeats independent detection/fitting
quality_or_failure_handling: No temporal association smoothing hysteresis or tracking; manual state is reused
menipy_relevance: Do not use as basis for temporal tracking

quality_or_failure_handling: No calibration surface tension volume area or pressure

algorithm: Multi-scale combined hysteresis; connectivity validation; per-row outer edges; convex ordering and sparsification
menipy_relevance: Defer; useful for future capsule plugin only

algorithm: Cuts capillary-connected portion; measures inner capillary diameter at cutoff; forces attachment symmetry
quality_or_failure_handling: Rejects invalid shape/capillary geometry in fitting paths

algorithm: Axisymmetric Laplace equation integrated by RK4 and fitted to measured contour
outputs: pressure density surface tension area volume fit error
quality_or_failure_handling: Checks convexity and capillary width; reports fit error

algorithm: Linear Hooke nonlinear Hooke and Mooney-Rivlin laws; explicit/implicit Runge-Kutta; single/parallel shooting; finite-difference Jacobian
outputs: elastic pressure Poisson ratio modulus area compression and profiles
quality_or_failure_handling: Discards problematic parameters and detects shooting failures

algorithm: Compressive hoop-stress region plus image wavelength measurement
outputs: wrinkle length tension wavelength Foppl-von Karman number and thickness
quality_or_failure_handling: Requires axisymmetry; non-axisymmetric wrinkle interpretation remains limited
menipy_relevance: Defer and require a dedicated validation dataset
